g.text: Trace sampling: three strategies, three coverage / cost tradeoffs
1M req/s is too expensive to trace fully. Each strategy keeps a different ~10K - 50K subset.
decide at entry, before work starts
- BLIND: drops errors at the same rate as normal
buffer all, decide AFTER request completes
memory & latency cost - this is the price tag
+ keeps 100% of errors / slow - exactly what you want
- needs memory (full spans buffered until completion)
- adds pipeline latency, needs a buffering collector
kept: ~2.1K / s (rates rebalance every few minutes)
+ hot services do not overwhelm the trace store
- rate-control logic is complex to tune and reason about
